text:
QTY_PRSCRBD_NUM 

LONG NAME: QTY_PRSCRBD_NUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The values for this field are highly variable and depend on the form of the drug that was prescribed 
(e.g., liquids or tablets). This quantity may differ from the quantity dispensed (QTY_DSPNSD_NUM) for 
incrementally filled Schedule II products. 

This field was new in 2025.
